meaning: vt.鍙栧嚭鍐呰剰,闄ゅ幓绮惧崕,闄ゅ幓涓昏閮ㄥ垎vi.鍑稿嚭
examples: Save your cold blood eviscerate as a finisher.
To remove the intestines or entrails of; eviscerate .
Would you want to cut a pig's throat and eviscerate him?
The Rule would not only violate the separation of powers doctrine, it would eviscerate it.
This in turn would eviscerate whatever hope remains of obtaining a complete accounting would surely vanish.
